'''hajuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftwoman|draftwoman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftwoman|draftwoman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hajuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjizith|hæjizith]] || [[word:hæjizij|hæjizij]] || [[word:hæjizish|hæjizish]] || [[word:hæjizi|hæjizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajujuzuth|hajujuzuth]] || [[word:hajujuzuj|hajujuzuj]] || [[word:hajujuzush|hajujuzush]] || [[word:hajujuzu|hajujuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajuzuth|hajuzuth]] || [[word:hajuzuj|hajuzuj]] || [[word:hajuzush|hajuzush]] || [[word:hajuzu|hajuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajufzuth|hajufzuth]] || [[word:hajufzuj|hajufzuj]] || [[word:hajufzush|hajufzush]] || [[word:hajufzuf|hajufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajuzuthu|hajuzuthu]] || [[word:hajuzuju|hajuzuju]] || [[word:hajuzushu|hajuzushu]] || [[word:hajuzuku|hajuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajuzuth|hajuzuth]] || [[word:hajuzuj|hajuzuj]] || [[word:hajuzush|hajuzush]] || [[word:hajuzu|hajuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajuzuthul|hajuzuthul]] || [[word:hajuzujul|hajuzujul]] || [[word:hajuzushul|hajuzushul]] || [[word:hajuzukul|hajuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajuzuthuthu|hajuzuthuthu]] || [[word:hajuzujuju|hajuzujuju]] || [[word:hajuzushushu|hajuzushushu]] || [[word:hajuzuku|hajuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajuzuthun|hajuzuthun]] || [[word:hajuzujun|hajuzujun]] || [[word:hajuzushun|hajuzushun]] || [[word:hajuzukun|hajuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajuzuthuoro|hajuzuthuoro]] || [[word:hajuzujuoro|hajuzujuoro]] || [[word:hajuzushuoro|hajuzushuoro]] || [[word:hajuzukuoro|hajuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
